case_title: CHIU-NI WANG VS. TD AMERITRADE, INC,

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM FILED BY WANG, CHIU-NI TD AMERITRADE, INC,
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-19-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WANG, CHIU-NI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TD AMERITRADE, INC, $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,065.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY WANG, CHIU-NI AS TO DEFENDANT TD AMERITRADE, INC, ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-19-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-04-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TD AMERITRADE, INC,
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT TD AMERITRADE, INC,
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WANG, CHIU-NI AS TO DEFENDANT TD AMERITRADE, INC,

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-19-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-19-2018 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY HENRY PANG, BRANCH MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT TD AMERITRADE, INC,
